description: Traversal, teleportation, flight, and enhanced mobility for getting where you need to be.
powers: Water Stride
Lakes and rivers become solid ground beneath the wielder's feet. The surface dimples but never breaks.
Phase Walk
Walls lose their meaning. The wielder steps through stone and wood as though passing through heavy curtains.
Phantom Steed
A ghostly mount appears at the wielder's call, tireless and swift, gone like mist when no longer needed.
Blink Step
The wielder vanishes and reappears wherever their gaze falls. The distance between is simply erased.
Sky Climb
The air itself becomes a staircase. Each step finds invisible purchase, carrying the wielder upward.
Waygate
Two distant places become one doorway. Step through here, arrive there. The space between ceases to exist.
Diminish
The wielder shrinks but loses nothing. Smaller body, same strength. A dangerous thing in a tiny package.
Featherfall
Gravity forgets the wielder exists. Falls from any height end gently, boots touching down like settling dust.
Light Ladder
Rungs of pure light materialize against any surface, climbing toward wherever the wielder needs to be.
Stepping Stones
Shimmering platforms appear across empty space, each one solid enough to bear weight, each one patient.
Canopy Dance
The wielder moves across treetops like wind. Branches bend but never break beneath those weightless steps.
Perfect Poise
Balance becomes effortless. Knife edges, wet rope, crumbling ledges. The wielder stands steady on all of them.
Fog Walker
Mist and fog part like curtains. What blinds others becomes an open road for the wielder.
Briar Pass
Living walls of vine and thorn open willingly. The green things recognize the wielder and step aside.
Stone Bridge
Solid stone erupts from nothing to span the gap. It holds long enough and asks nothing in return.
Cloud Step
The clouds harden underfoot into solid platforms. Walking on sky feels exactly like walking on earth.
